# Harness Rules Index

All rule content is authored in `.ai/harness/rules/`. Agent wrappers are derived.
Edit centralized source → update wrappers. See `governance/rules-codebase-sync.md`.

## Governance Rules (always-on, globs: `**/*`)

| Rule | Centralized | Claude Wrapper | Cursor Wrapper |
|------|-------------|----------------|----------------|
| anchor-context-startup | `governance/anchor-context-startup.md` | `.claude/rules/governance/anchor-context-startup.md` | `.cursor/rules/governance-anchor-context-startup.mdc` |
| memory-freshness | `governance/memory-freshness.md` | `.claude/rules/governance/memory-freshness.md` | `.cursor/rules/governance-memory-freshness.mdc` |
| llm-wiki-protocol | `governance/llm-wiki-protocol.md` | `.claude/rules/governance/llm-wiki-protocol.md` | `.cursor/rules/governance-llm-wiki-protocol.mdc` |
| ddd-freshness | `governance/ddd-freshness.md` | `.claude/rules/governance/ddd-freshness.md` | `.cursor/rules/governance-ddd-freshness.mdc` |
| root-files-freshness | `governance/root-files-freshness.md` | `.claude/rules/governance/root-files-freshness.md` | `.cursor/rules/governance-root-files-freshness.mdc` |
| harness-self-improvement | `governance/harness-self-improvement.md` | `.claude/rules/governance/harness-self-improvement.md` | `.cursor/rules/governance-harness-self-improvement.mdc` |
| anti-slop-gate | `governance/anti-slop-gate.md` | `.claude/rules/governance/anti-slop-gate.md` | `.cursor/rules/governance-anti-slop-gate.mdc` |
| adversarial-dispatch-discipline | `governance/adversarial-dispatch-discipline.md` | `.claude/rules/governance/adversarial-dispatch-discipline.md` | `.cursor/rules/governance-adversarial-dispatch-discipline.mdc` |
| actionable-artifact-gate | `governance/actionable-artifact-gate.md` | `.claude/rules/governance/actionable-artifact-gate.md` | `.cursor/rules/governance-actionable-artifact-gate.mdc` |
| rules-codebase-sync | `governance/rules-codebase-sync.md` | `.claude/rules/governance/rules-codebase-sync.md` | `.cursor/rules/governance-rules-codebase-sync.mdc` |
| specs-driven | `governance/specs-driven.md` | `.claude/rules/governance/specs-driven.md` | `.cursor/rules/governance-specs-driven.mdc` |

## Structure Rules (globs: `**/*`)

| Rule | Centralized | Claude Wrapper | Cursor Wrapper |
|------|-------------|----------------|----------------|
| repository-structure | `structure/repository-structure.md` | `.claude/rules/structure/repository-structure.md` | `.cursor/rules/structure-repository-structure.mdc` |

## Markdown Rules (globs: `**/*.md`)

| Rule | Centralized | Claude Wrapper | Cursor Wrapper |
|------|-------------|----------------|----------------|
| markdown-conventions | `markdown/conventions.md` | `.claude/rules/markdown/conventions.md` | `.cursor/rules/markdown-conventions.mdc` |

## Domain Rules (globs: `log/employer/eneco/**`, `.ai/tasks/**`)

| Rule | Centralized | Claude Wrapper | Cursor Wrapper |
|------|-------------|----------------|----------------|
| on-call-incident-workflow | `domain/on-call-incident-workflow.md` | `.claude/rules/domain/on-call-incident-workflow.md` | `.cursor/rules/domain-on-call-incident-workflow.mdc` |

## Loading Strategy

Do NOT load all rules at startup. Load only rules whose globs match your task files:
- Working on `log/employer/eneco/**` → load domain + governance rules
- Working on any `*.md` file → load markdown conventions
- Working on harness files → load governance/rules-codebase-sync + governance/ddd-freshness
- Any session start → governance rules are always-on (loaded by anchor-context-startup)
